findings.description: Content-Security-Policy header is not present. Mitigates XSS and data injection attacks.
findings.recommendation: Add the Content-Security-Policy HTTP response header with a secure policy.

findings.description: Strict-Transport-Security header is not present. Forces HTTPS and prevents SSL stripping.
findings.recommendation: Add the Strict-Transport-Security HTTP response header with a secure policy.

findings.description: X-Frame-Options header is not present. Reduces clickjacking risk.
findings.recommendation: Add the X-Frame-Options HTTP response header with a secure policy.
